def run(controller):
    controller.reset()
    info = controller.sample_info()
    target_ml = info["target_volume_ml"]
    liquid = info["liquid"]
    controller.get_constraints(target_ml)
    if liquid == "water":
        overaspirate_ml = 0.025 * target_ml
    else:
        overaspirate_ml = 0.0625 * target_ml
    result = controller.measure(target_ml, overaspirate_ml, 20, 1, 3)
    if result["relative_error"] > 0.04 or result["coefficient_of_variation"] > 0.05:
        overaspirate_ml = overaspirate_ml * (1.0 + result["relative_error"])
        result = controller.measure(target_ml, overaspirate_ml, 20, 1, 3)
    controller.cleanup()
    return result
```
